allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add multi-user login system with separate progress tracking

- Integrate LoginScreen component for user authentication
- Add user-specific localStorage keys \(vani_progress_$user\)
- Each user now has separate saved progress \(track, position, tab\)
- Add logout button in header \(icon only on mobile, username + icon on desktop\)
- Persist logged-in user across sessions
- Auto-resume playback from user''s last position on login

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
